/usr/bin/ar qc libi2pd.a CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Base.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Blinding.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Config.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Crypto.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/CryptoKey.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Datagram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Destination.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/ECIESX25519AEADRatchetSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Ed25519.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Elligator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/FS.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Family.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Garlic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Gost.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Gzip.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/HTTP.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/I2NPProtocol.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/I2PEndian.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Identity.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/KadDHT.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/LeaseSet.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Log.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/NTCP2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/NetDb.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/NetDbRequests.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Profiling.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Reseed.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/RouterContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/RouterInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/SSU2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/SSU2OutOfSession.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/SSU2Session.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Signature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Streaming.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Timestamp.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/TransitTunnel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Transports.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/Tunnel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/TunnelBase.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/TunnelConfig.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/TunnelEndpoint.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/TunnelGateway.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/TunnelPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/api.cpp.o CMakeFiles/libi2pd.dir/libi2pd/util.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libi2pd.a
